title: UFO War Ignites As Tim Gallaudet Accused Of Conspiracy Bias And Backing Fringe Alien Tech Claims
description: The UAP debate escalates as Gallaudet accuses Kirkpatrick of disinformation, sparking a UFO war. The clash highlights issues of credibility and transparency in UAP investigations

title: UFO Red Herring? Ross Coulthart Slams 'Pattern Problem' in Viral Missing UFO Scientist Claims
description: Investigative reporter Ross Coulthart has challenged viral claims that a string of deaths and disappearances among defence staff form a sinister UFO pattern, warning that misreported 'missing scientists' risk turning into a red herring.

title: UFO War Ignites As Tim Gallaudet Accused Of Conspiracy Bias And Backing Fringe Alien Tech Claims
description: The UAP debate escalates as Gallaudet accuses Kirkpatrick of disinformation, sparking a UFO war. The clash highlights issues of credibility and transparency in UAP investigations

title: Yankee Blue UFO Hoax Exposed by Sean Kirkpatrick as Secret Air Force Cadet Programme Sparks Misled Alien Claims
description: A Pentagon investigation reveals 'Yankee Blue,' an Air Force ritual that misled cadets into believing they were part of a UFO program, fueling decades of alien myths.

title: UAP marks World Veterinary Day with focus on food security
description: Peshawar - Experts at the University of Agriculture Peshawar (UAP) on Tuesday stressed the need for strengthening veterinary services, modern livestock management and research to ensure food security and public health during a ceremony held in connection with World Veterinary Day 2026.
